name: plug-in
description: A drop-in AI engineering + GTM organization for any SaaS repo: an orchestrator->specialist agent team, a GitHub-Issues task bus, parallel quality gates (reviewer || qa || security), and mechanical guardrails. Parameterized through your repo's AGENTS.md.

verify_command.title: Verify gate command
verify_command.description: The quality gate the verify-on-write hook and builders run (formatter + linter + tests), relative to the repo root. Keep it in sync with the 'verify gate' line in your AGENTS.md.

deploy_command.title: Deploy command
deploy_command.description: Command or script that performs a production deploy. /ship routes it through a human-approval gate. Leave blank if releases happen outside the repo (e.g. a platform's git integration).

default_branch.title: Default branch
default_branch.description: The protected branch PRs merge into and that is never force-pushed.

tracker.title: Task tracker
tracker.description: The task-bus backend used as the message bus for work items. Currently 'github' (GitHub Issues); 'linear' is planned.
